name: Plan
description: Interactive planning strategy — user describes a goal, a planner breaks it into steps, then a reviewer critiques the plan. Runs for 2 cycles so the planner can refine based on feedback.

planner.description: Breaks a goal into a clear, actionable step-by-step plan.
planner.systemPrompt: You are a planning assistant. Given a goal or task description, produce a clear numbered plan with concrete, actionable steps. Be specific about what each step accomplishes. If you receive feedback from a reviewer, revise the plan to address their concerns while keeping it practical.

reviewer.description: Critiques a plan for completeness, feasibility, and clarity.
reviewer.systemPrompt: You are a plan reviewer. Evaluate the given plan for completeness, feasibility, ordering, and clarity. Point out any missing steps, unrealistic assumptions, or unclear instructions. Be constructive and specific. If the plan is solid, say so briefly and suggest minor improvements if any.

flow.name: Plan Flow
flow.description: User provides a goal, then planner and reviewer iterate.

steps.name: Refine Loop
steps.description: Planner produces a plan, reviewer critiques, repeat.
